# matomo_tagmanager_enable_preview_mode (Action)

Enables preview mode for a Tag Manager container's current draft version.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "matomo_tagmanager_enable_preview_mode" "preview" {
  config {
    container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.main.id
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_id` (String) The container's id (matomo_tagmanager_container.x.id).
